since_last: 68% of 100 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +4.06%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 68% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.38% · BTC +4.23% · Gold +1.55% · Nasdaq100 +1.10%. 68% of 100 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +4.06%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +4.06%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -1.27%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: IBM is the standout at -24.35%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +12.62%, OKTA +10.97%, S +7.44%, DELL +7.02%, PANW +6.87%. Laggards: IBM -24.35%, SKHY -8.63%, ARM -6.35%, ISRG -6.35%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.47% at $137.1
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.47% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
